mapper.sql: file.file_key, file.ori_filename, file.file_ext, file.mime_type, file.thum_mime_type, file.file_size, file.parent_path, file.file_hash, file.use_yn, file.base64_string, file.reg_date, file.mod_date, file.reg_user_key, file.mod_user_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_file (file_key, ori_filename, file_ext, mime_type, thum_mime_type, file_size, parent_path, file_hash, use_yn, base64_string, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{fileKey}, #{oriFilename}, #{fileExt}, #{mimeType}, #{thumMimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{parentPath}, #{fileHash}, #{useYn}, #{base64String}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
